Title: Point X Y Sum
Problem_Statement: Define struct Point {int x; int y;}. Read x y and print x+y.

Title: Rectangle Area Struct
Problem_Statement: Define struct Rect {int l; int b;}. Read l b and print area l*b.

Title: Student Marks Sum
Problem_Statement: Define struct Student {int m1; int m2;}. Read m1 m2 and print sum.

Title: Book Price
Problem_Statement: Define struct Book {int id; int price;}. Read id price and print price.

Title: Time Total Minutes
Problem_Statement: Define struct Time {int h; int m;}. Read h m and print total minutes h*60+m.

Title: Complex Real Part
Problem_Statement: Define struct Complex {int real; int imag;}. Read real imag and print real.

Title: Circle Area Approx
Problem_Statement: Define struct Circle {int r;}. Read r and print integer area 22*r*r/7.

Title: Item Total Cost
Problem_Statement: Define struct Item {int qty; int price;}. Read qty price and print total qty*price.

Title: Distance Origin Squared
Problem_Statement: Define struct Point {int x; int y;}. Read x y and print x*x + y*y.

Title: Employee Salary
Problem_Statement: Define struct Emp {int id; int sal;}. Read id sal and print sal.

Title: Point Distance Squared
Problem_Statement: Read two points x1 y1 x2 y2. Print squared distance (x2-x1)^2 + (y2-y1)^2.

Title: Complex Add
Problem_Statement: Read r1 i1 r2 i2. Compute sum of two complex numbers and print real imag space separated.

Title: Student Average
Problem_Statement: Read marks m1 m2 m3. Print integer average (m1+m2+m3)/3.

Title: Time Add
Problem_Statement: Read h1 m1 h2 m2. Add times properly handling minutes >= 60. Print total hours and minutes space separated.

Title: Rectangle Perimeter Struct
Problem_Statement: Read l b of struct Rect. Print perimeter 2*(l+b).

Title: Student Pass Check
Problem_Statement: Read id m1 m2. Print Pass if average >= 40 else Fail.

Title: Oldest Employee
Problem_Statement: Read age of 3 employees age1 age2 age3. Print max age.

Title: Highest Priced Book
Problem_Statement: Read prices of 3 books p1 p2 p3. Print max price.

Title: Vector Dot Product
Problem_Statement: Read 3D vectors x1 y1 z1 x2 y2 z2. Print dot product x1*x2 + y1*y2 + z1*z2.

Title: Fraction Simplify Approx
Problem_Statement: Read num den. Print integer quotient num/den.

Title: Student Grades Struct Array
Problem_Statement:
Write a C program to enter info (name, reg no, marks in 6 subjects) of N students into an array of structures, find average & display grade based on average.
Average Grade mapping:
80-100 Distinction
60-79 First Class
40-59 Second Class
<40 Fail
Read N. For each student read Name, RegNo, then 6 integer marks. Output exact line per student: '<Name> <RegNo> <Average> <Grade>' where Average is rounded integer.

Title: Complex Multiply
Problem_Statement: Read r1 i1 r2 i2. Compute product (r1*r2 - i1*i2) + i*(r1*i2 + r2*i1). Print real imag space separated.

Title: Time Difference Seconds
Problem_Statement: Read h1 m1 s1 h2 m2 s2 (time 2 >= time 1). Compute difference in total seconds and print.

Title: Top Student Among N
Problem_Statement: Read N. Read N pairs of (name, total_marks). Print name of student with highest marks.

Title: Department Salary Sum
Problem_Statement: Read N. Read N pairs of (dept_id, salary). Read target dept_id. Print sum of salaries for target dept.

Title: Vector Cross Product Z
Problem_Statement: Read 2D vectors x1 y1 x2 y2. Compute z-component of cross product x1*y2 - y1*x2 and print.
